goal: Wire loan application to LoanProductConfig, migrate interestMethod to enum, add interest tracking fields

tasks.name: Add sacco-config dependency and update LoanApplication entity
tasks.action: Add sacco-config dependency to sacco-loan pom.xml. On LoanApplication: add loanProductId (UUID), change interestMethod from String to InterestMethod enum, add totalInterestAccrued and totalInterestPaid BigDecimal fields with default ZERO.

tasks.name: Refactor LoanService and LoanServiceImpl for config-driven application
tasks.action: Replace LoanApplicationRequest fields (remove interestRate/interestMethod, add loanProductId). Change LoanService.applyForLoan signature. In LoanServiceImpl: inject ConfigService, lookup LoanProductConfig, enforce limits, set rate/method from config. In disburseLoan: use enum comparison. Update RepaymentScheduleGenerator to accept InterestMethod enum.

tasks.name: Update controller, DTOs, and fix all tests
tasks.action: Update LoanController.applyForLoan to pass loanProductId. Update LoanResponse to include loanProductId, totalInterestAccrued, totalInterestPaid, and InterestMethod enum. Fix all existing sacco-loan tests for new signatures.

commitMessage: feat(loan): wire loan application to LoanProductConfig and migrate interestMethod to enum
